description.value:
A thick, weighted club of dense hardwood, heavy enough to knock a man off his feet when thrown or swung with full force. Versatile enough to be gripped in two hands for extra power.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d4, Bludgeoning
BasicOne-Handed, Melee d6, Versatile 2d4, Thrown (20/40), Bludgeoning
MasterOne-Handed, Melee d6, Versatile 2d4, Thrown (20/40), Bludgeoning, Mighty Blow
Master PerkMighty Blow: the target must succeed on a CON save or suffer disadvantage on all attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

rmeData.masterPerk: Mighty Blow: the target must succeed on a CON save or suffer disadvantage on all attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.
